articles.title: XRP Whale Transactions
articles.description: Despite a significant drop in its market value, XRP has witnessed a surge in whale transactions, and major investors remain confident, while a substantial security breach involving the theft of 213 million XRP has also occurred.

articles.title: Astar Network announces mainnet launch for its Polygon-powered zkEVM
articles.description: Astar zkEVM mainnet is set to go live this month. A launch campaign dubbed “Yoki Origins” will commence immediately after the zkEVM mainnet Astar Network, a multi-chain smart contracts and Web3 infrastructure platform, has announced the mainnet launch of Astar zkEVM, a new Layer 2 scaling solution for Ethereum. Astar zKEVM is a zero-knowledge Ethereum […]
